title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Arena Animation Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Arena Animation Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Arena Animation Capital India in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Arena Animation Capital India:
Arena Animation Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
